zh.St Peter's Church, Upwell, Norfolk, Engl: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可武普維爾聖 比特也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: Henry Davye於大約1381年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可伊斯頓。他於大約1406年與Mrs Henry Ryxe在英國英格蘭諾福爾可武普維爾聖 比特也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Davye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of English   Davey   or Scottish   Davie  .

variants.name: Davey
meanings: English: from the personal name Davy, originally an Old French vernacular form of the Biblical name David which became the most common form of the name in medieval England.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: Henry Davye was born about 1381, in Easton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. He married Mrs Henry Ryxe about 1406, in St Peter's Church, Upwell, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

ja.Easton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクエアストン
ja.St Peter's Church, Upwell, Norfolk, Engl: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクウプウエルスト ペテル'ス チャーチ
ja.lifeSummary: Henry Davyeは約1381年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクエアストンで生まれた。約1406年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウプウエルスト ペテル'ス チャーチでMrs Henry Ryxeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.St Peter's Church, Upwell, Norfolk, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 업웰 스트 피터'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Henry Davye(은)는 대략 1381년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 이스트에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1406년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 업웰 스트 피터'스 c후르치에서 Mrs Henry Ryxe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.
